name: First Community Bank
description_short: Batesville, AR's First Community Bank branch at 1325 Harrison St provides convenient local banking.
description_long:
First Community Bank's Batesville branch is located at 1325 Harrison St in the heart of Batesville, AR. This standalone facility serves Batesville residents with convenient access to banking services right in their community.

The Batesville branch offers a range of banking services including checking and savings accounts, lending options, and other financial products. For current hours and specific services available at this Batesville location, contact the branch directly.

Banking in Batesville, AR? Bring a valid ID and any financial documents you may need. First Community Bank delivers community-focused banking to Batesville's residents and local businesses.
services: Credit cards with rewards, low rates, and credit-building options
Business treasury management and cash management solutions
ACH debits and credits for payroll and vendor payments
Business credit cards and purchasing cards
pros: Online account opening available for new customers, streamlining the application process
24/7 online banking with ability to schedule payments and transfer funds outside business hours
GenGold Member program offers cashback and discounts on everyday products and services
Business treasury management suite including ACH, lockbox, remote deposit, and bill pay solutions
Hometown mortgage lenders with online application option for convenience
Merchant services with competitive rates and local customer service emphasis
Multiple credit card options designed for different needs (rewards, low interest, credit building)
cons: Geographic limitation to Arkansas and Missouri only, not available nationwide
Website provides minimal transparency on specific rates, fees, or minimum account balances
No mention of mobile banking app despite emphasis on digital convenience
Limited information about credit card APRs, rewards rates, or eligibility requirements
Internet Explorer discontinuation notice suggests potentially outdated website technology infrastructure
best_for: Small-to-medium business owners in Arkansas and Missouri seeking integrated treasury management and merchant services
Individuals and families in their service areas wanting a relationship-based bank with multiple product options
Business customers needing lockbox, ACH, and remote deposit capabilities alongside traditional banking
Customers preferring local decision-making and community-focused banking over national institutions
diagnosis: First Community Bank is best for individuals and businesses in Arkansas and Missouri seeking traditional, relationship-based banking with comprehensive product offerings and local service. The main caveat is that specific product terms, rates, and fees are not disclosed on the website, requiring direct contact with the bank for pricing and eligibility information before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: First Community Bank at 1325 Harrison St, Batesville, AR. Banking services for the Batesville community.
